meta.author: Tee (Engineering Team Lead)
meta.purpose: Canonical machine-parseable dependency map for the 9 Enterprises universe. All claims verified against live code and running processes.
meta.verification_method: Code inspection of all .mjs scripts, LaunchAgent plists, package.json files, GitHub Actions workflows, and live ps aux output.

components.name: Comms Hub
components.description: Central message router and orchestration brain. Runs all 4 comms channels in parallel. Switches between relay mode (terminal active) and autonomous OC mode (terminal absent). Includes freeze watchdog, terminal recovery, cloud sync, Supabase mirror, and Neon backup.

external_apis.purpose: Autonomous OC responses when terminal is absent. Also API health probing.
Primary inbound/outbound channel for Jasson messages
iMessage send fallback, SMS bridge
Email send channel via nodemailer + app password
Cloud mirror of all messages and actions for cross-device sync
Secondary cloud backup of conversations
State sync push to always-on cloud backup

data_stores.purpose: iMessage read — requires Full Disk Access

components.spof_risk: CRITICAL — single process, single Mac. All 4 comms channels die when this dies.
security_notes: HUB_API_SECRET protects /context endpoint when set; optional so missing key = open endpoint
iMessage read requires Full Disk Access (FDA) — breaks in LaunchAgent degraded mode
Telegram offset tracked via /tmp file — replay risk on file loss
OC impersonation regex filter present but not tested under adversarial conditions

components.name: Voice Server
components.description: Twilio voice webhook handler. Streams Claude responses converted by ElevenLabs TTS. Exposed to public internet via cloudflared tunnel. Context-aware voice persona with per-contact sentence thresholds.

external_apis.purpose: Conversational response generation for voice calls
Text-to-speech conversion for voice responses
Voice call routing and TwiML response
Expose port 3456 to public internet for Twilio callback

data_stores.purpose: Buffered TTS audio served to Twilio
Latest call transcript for 9 to read

reverse_dependencies: Twilio (routes inbound voice calls to this service)
comms-hub (watchdogs this service, restarts if port unreachable)
components.spof_risk: HIGH — tunnel URL is ephemeral (changes on restart). Twilio must be manually updated with new URL after each restart. Single instance, no redundancy.
security_notes: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN used for signature validation of inbound webhooks — correctly implemented
Audio files in /tmp are not cleaned up on a schedule — disk exhaustion risk over time
Tunnel URL is logged in TUNNEL_URL env var but may drift after auto-restart

components.name: Jules (Telegram — Jasson personal assistant)
components.description: Personal AI assistant for Jasson Fishback via Telegram bot. Polling-based. Haiku for cost, Sonnet for complex. Maintains persistent profile in JSON.

external_apis.purpose: Conversational responses to Jasson
Polling for messages, sending responses

components.spof_risk: LOW — jules is a standalone assistant. Failure doesn't cascade to other components.
security_notes: Bot token hardcoded as fallback in source code (line visible in audit) — should be env-only
No rate limiting on API calls

components.name: Kids Mentor / Bengal Pro
components.description: AI mentor for Jude and Duke Fishback via iMessage group chat 'Dumbasses'. Reads Messages DB, builds web projects, deploys to dist/ and public/. Persona adapts to age.

external_apis.purpose: Kid-persona conversational AI and code generation
Send iMessage replies to the group chat

data_stores.purpose: Persistent memory about kids' interests and projects
Sandboxed output for kid-built web projects

components.spof_risk: LOW — standalone. Failure affects only kids' mentor service.
security_notes: Sandbox path enforcement present — writes locked to dist/duke/, dist/jude/, public/duke/, public/jude/
execSync used for AppleScript send — input sanitization present for double quotes and apostrophes
Full Disk Access required — breaks if FDA revoked

components.name: Pilot Server / FreeAgent9
components.description: Personal AI assistant for Kyle Cabezas (Rapid Mortgage Cincy branch manager). SMS via Twilio. OpenWeather briefings. Pilot instance of FreeAgent9 product. Twilio webhook signature validation implemented.

external_apis.purpose: Assistant responses to Kyle Cabezas
SMS send/receive for Kyle Cabezas
Cincinnati weather for daily briefings

components.spof_risk: LOW — single pilot user. Failure affects only Kyle Cabezas' assistant.
security_notes: Twilio HMAC-SHA1 webhook signature validation correctly implemented using Node.js crypto
64KB max request body enforced
Security events logged to logs/freeagent-security.log
No rate limiting on individual phone numbers

components.name: Trader9
components.description: Multi-asset algorithmic trading bot. Alpaca paper account ($333 live). 8-strategy ensemble on stocks, ETFs, crypto. 5-minute cycle. Sends trade notifications to comms-hub.

external_apis.purpose: Trade execution, account info, order management
Real-time and historical price bars for strategy signals
Trade notifications to Jasson via Telegram

data_stores.purpose: Circuit breaker — halt trading until a specific time

components.spof_risk: MEDIUM — live trading account. Bot crash = missed trade signals. No automatic restart mechanism (not in LaunchAgent).
security_notes: Live trading keys (ALPACA_LIVE_API_KEY) present in .env — activated if set
No position size sanity check beyond 20% portfolio cap
No kill-switch endpoint accessible externally
Log path hard-coded to absolute path — will fail if project moves

components.name: Trinity
components.description: Autonomous discovery agent. Scans X, YouTube, Hacker News, Product Hunt every 15 minutes. Reports AI tool and opportunity findings to comms hub /context. Haiku for scan, Sonnet for deep eval.

external_apis.purpose: Discovery scan summaries and deep evaluations
Post discovery findings to shared state

components.spof_risk: LOW — informational only. Failure causes missed intelligence but no service degradation.
security_notes: Reads .env directly by parsing file — not via dotenv library
No authentication on hub /context POST call — relies on hub being localhost-only

components.name: AI Underwriter
components.description: Mortgage guideline assistant. Handles FHA, Conventional (Fannie/Freddie), VA, Jumbo queries. Reads markdown guideline files as RAG source. No authentication on endpoints.

external_apis.purpose: Answer mortgage guideline questions

components.spof_risk: LOW — local only, no external users. But no auth = if ever exposed, any caller can query.
security_notes: CRITICAL: No authentication on /query endpoint
No rate limiting
10KB max request body enforced
45-second timeout enforced
Never exposed to internet currently — but no auth means one accidental tunnel = open access

components.name: Health Monitor
components.status: NOT RUNNING (not in LaunchAgent list — managed ad hoc)
components.description: Real-time health monitoring. Polls all components every 30s (fast) and 5m (slow). Logs to SQLite health_events table. Alerts via Telegram on severity >= warning. Deduplicates alerts within 5-min window.

external_apis.purpose: Send health alerts to Jasson

components.spof_risk: MEDIUM — when not running, comms-hub logs 'health monitor down' alerts but continues. No health data collected.

components.name: Terminal Opener
components.description: LaunchAgent daemon that watches /tmp/9-open-terminal signal file. On signal: opens Terminal, runs 'claude' command to start a new Claude Code session. Includes API health check before launch and 3x retry.

external_apis.purpose: Verify API reachable before opening terminal

reverse_dependencies: comms-hub (writes the signal file that triggers this service)
components.spof_risk: MEDIUM — if this fails, terminal cannot be auto-opened remotely. Jasson must open terminal manually.
security_notes: Two instances running simultaneously (PIDs 12147, 12148) — potential conflict/race condition on signal file

components.name: Cloud Worker (Backup QB)
components.status: BUILT — NOT DEPLOYED (code exists, deploy.sh not run)
components.description: Cloudflare Worker. Always-on cloud backup. Handles Telegram when Mac is down. KV stores heartbeat and shared state. Cron trigger every 2 minutes checks Mac heartbeat.

external_apis.purpose: Autonomous responses when Mac is down
Send/receive Telegram messages as cloud fallback
Heartbeat, conversation history, shared state

reverse_dependencies: comms-hub (pushes state to cloud worker for sync)
components.spof_risk: HIGH — currently not deployed. If Mac goes down, no cloud failover exists.
security_notes: CLOUD_SECRET used for mutual authentication between Mac hub and cloud worker
KV namespace ID hardcoded in wrangler.toml

components.name: AiNFLGM (PlayAiGM)
components.description: Consumer NFL offseason simulator for Bengals fans. React SPA with PWA. Deployed to GitHub Pages. Data refreshed 2x/day via GitHub Actions. No backend — fully static.

external_apis.purpose: NFL cap space and roster data (scraped — no official API)
User analytics
Display advertising (account not yet approved)

data_stores.type: static files served by GitHub Pages

build_pipeline.trigger: GitHub Actions on push to main

components.spof_risk: LOW — GitHub Pages managed hosting. Main risk is OTC scraping breaking on site structure changes.
security_notes: Static site — minimal attack surface
AdSense pub key and Analytics tag ID exposed in HTML source (acceptable by design)
Service worker caching conflict (documented unresolved) may serve stale content after deploys

components.name: Memory Database
components.description: SQLite persistence layer for the 9 system. Better-sqlite3 with optional SQLCipher encryption. 8 tables. Imported by comms-hub and health-monitor. Supabase mirror via comms-hub post-write hooks.
components.spof_risk: CRITICAL — primary source of truth for all conversations, actions, decisions, tasks. No automated backup.
security_notes: SQLITE_ENCRYPTION_KEY controls encryption. If not set, database is plaintext.
WAL files (9-memory.db-shm, 9-memory.db-wal) are unencrypted even when main DB is encrypted
No automated backup schedule — data loss on disk failure or accidental deletion
Pre-sqlcipher backup file exists: data/9-memory.db.pre-sqlcipher-backup

components.name: Command Hub (Dashboard)
components.description: Next.js admin dashboard for the 9 system. Connects to Supabase for real-time data. Not currently running — built but never deployed to production.

external_apis.purpose: Real-time messages, actions, state display

components.spof_risk: N/A — not running. Dead product until deployed.
security_notes: No auth layer defined in reviewed code
Uses @supabase/ssr — correct pattern for Next.js
No deployment target defined

components.name: cloudflared Tunnel
components.description: Cloudflare tunnel process. Exposes voice-server port 3456 to public internet via ephemeral trycloudflare.com subdomain. Spawned by comms-hub startup check.
reverse_dependencies: voice-server (must have tunnel to receive Twilio callbacks)
Twilio (Twilio voice webhook points to this tunnel URL)
components.spof_risk: HIGH — URL is ephemeral. Twilio webhook config must be updated manually after each tunnel restart. If tunnel dies and restarts with new URL, voice calls fail until updated.
security_notes: No authentication on tunnel itself — relies on Twilio webhook validation in voice-server
trycloudflare.com URL is publicly guessable once known (though random subdomain)

cloud_mirrors.sync: Real-time via post-write hooks in comms-hub

external_services_summary.criticality: CRITICAL — single AI provider. All intelligence depends on this.

external_services_summary.failover: cloud-worker handles if Mac down (when deployed)

external_services_summary.criticality: MEDIUM — voice calls degrade to text if this fails
MEDIUM — cloud mirror only. Hub continues without it.

external_services_summary.failover: None — GitHub Pages is the only host
